vendor_trend_items.recommended_action: Escalate to executive vendor review and require documented corrective action with CAPA linkage.
Place vendor on leadership watch and trend inspection recurrence during monthly governance review.
Continue manager follow-up and monitor transport timing variance for recurrence.

executive_recommendations: Review vendors assigned to executive_review before routine vendor governance discussion.
Prioritize vendors with worsening score movement, repeat events, and CAPA-linked defects.
Use vendor_score_delta and repeat_event_vendor_count as monthly vendor governance indicators.
Link repeat vendor events to CAPA governance and contract performance review.
